name: Spinach Pesto
recipeIngredient: 2 10-oz pkgs frozen chopped spinach, thawed, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the thawed and drained spinach, basil, garlic, parsley, olive oil, butter (or margarine), and parmesan cheese to a blender or food processor.
2. Blend until all ingredients are smooth and well combined.
3. Turn off the blender and carefully transfer the mixture into a serving dish.
